title: Building a still; how to make moonshine
description: Building a still. How to make moonshine. Double-run moonshine, flavored with oak shavings.

title: Stool-pigeons; paying protection; operation on Moon Creek
description: Stool-pigeons and reveneurs. Paying protection. Massive operation on Moon Creek.

title: Starting as a moonshiner; curing ulcers; squealers
description: Ulysses' start as a moonshiner. Moonshine cures his ulcers. Buying a still from Montgomery-Wards. Squealers.

title: Moonshiner competition; busts and close escapes; caught by Federals
description: Competition between moonshiners. Busts and close escapes. Ulysses caught in his still-house by the Federal.

title: Bunt Roland was a stool pigeon; Bunt tries to set him up; turning informer after they were arrested
description: Bob West beats a Black man to death. West wouldn't go looking for stills, would only serve warrants. Bunt Roland, stool pigeon, tries to set Ulysses up. Some people would turn informer after they were arrested.

title: Ulysses' trial; McNeil's Island Penitentiary; cousin was a con man
description: Ulysses' trial. A sharp lawyer tries to get him to fight it. Life at McNeil's Island Penitentiary. One of Ulysses' cousins was a con man.

title: Moscow Mountain settlers; Lee Guy gets shot
description: Moscow Mountain settlers. Lee Guy gets shot at.

title: Charley Rambo and Lev Rambo; the Peterson brothers
description: Charley Rambo, a good fighter. Lev Rambo, a gambler. The Patterson brothers, a tough bunch.

title: Grace Fleming; houses free of disease
description: Three whorehouses west of the tracks. Grace Fleming, madam. The whorehouses were supposed to be free of disease.

title: Moscow saloons; Moscow brewery; informers
description: Saloons in Moscow. Moscow brewery. Informers.

title: Gambling in Moscow; games in the logging camps; feared new decks were marked
description: Gambling in Moscow; you couldn't find an honest game. Ulysses shilled games in the logging camps. Loggers wouldn't play with a new deck, fearing it was marked.

title: Set-ups and cold-decking
description: Set-ups and cold-decking. Playing the suckers.

title: Cold-decking; brother conned in Spokane
description: Cold-decking (continued). Ulysses brother is conned and cleaned in Spokane.

title: Curing illnesses with smallpox
description: Getting rolled in the whorehouse. Ten dollars a night, two and a half a chunk. Most whores were from out-of-town. Clap was a problem everywhere. Curing clap with smallpox.

title: Houses outside Moscow; doctors that could cure illnesses
description: Poorhouse and Pesthouse outside Moscow. Curing clap. Dr. McGee could cure clap and Dr. Gritman couldn't.

title: Fights; beer parlors; bullies
description: Fights, beer parlors, and bullies. "Now tear in you son of a bitch."
